reviews.comment:
Fui a las 7 de la mañana a tomar un café y descansar.
La música a todo lo que da.La señorita que atiende desalineada y desprolija
El café un desastre!

I went at 7 a.m. to get a coffee and relax.
The music was blaring. The lady serving us was disheveled and untidy.
The coffee was a disaster!
